queue_item.action: Measure interaction-specific latency using Event Timing phase decomposition rather than inferring user harm from frame congestion alone.

progress.finding: Group PerformanceEventTiming entries by interactionId and decompose the worst event into input delay, processing duration, and presentation delay.
progress.verification: 5 deterministic Node.js tests passed in an isolated runtime using byte-identical pre-commit files

queue_item.handoff: Vercel Studio and Independent Creative Web should pair this observer with R-005 Long Animation Frames evidence and run controlled stalls in each latency phase. Neither signal alone should be treated as proof of subjective harm.
